description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 17 hrs 6 mins of coding time, averaging 3 hrs 15 mins per day. He opened 12 pull requests in qiuethan/Misty, numbered #106 through #117. His tracked language mix was led by Python, followed by Markdown, SQL, and TypeScript.
